ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage recorded */,
  "light" REAL /* Light level measured in lux */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 concentration in ppm */,
  "humidity_ratio" REAL /* Humidity ratio during the measurement */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Occupancy status (1 for occupied, 0 for unoccupied) */,
  "out_temp" REAL /* Outdoor temperature */,
  "out_humi" REAL /* Outdoor humidity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "floor_level" INTEGER /* Floor level where the data was collected */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room or area within the building */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the building */,
  "building_size" INTEGER /* Size of the building in square feet */,
  "num_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, light) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the building */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the sensor is installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, technician) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the alert originated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high CO2, high humidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
